## Summary

Describe the change and the reason for it.

## Validation

- [ ] `npm run lint`
- [ ] `npm run typecheck`
- [ ] `npm test`
- [ ] `npm run build`

## Checklist

- [ ] Scope is focused and intentional
- [ ] Docs were updated if contributor-facing behavior changed
- [ ] Screenshots are attached for meaningful UI changes
- [ ] Follow-up work is captured explicitly
